title: Prema Entha Madhuram Priyuraalu Antha Katinam
original_title: Prema Entha Madhuram Priyuraalu Antha Katinam
overview: Jai, a young man is looking for Mythili and then meets Sara who knows about Mythili whom is the current interest of Jai. Jai absconds from Sarah when she proposes him. Finally Jai meets Mythili and he impresses her. When everything seems to be going fine for Jai, he gets to know and find out the truth which shatters his love.
